mapper.select:
SELECT u.id AS adminId, u.login_id AS adminLoginId, u.name AS adminName, u.email AS adminEmail, u.role_id AS adminRoleId, ur.code AS adminRoleCode, u.status AS adminStatus, u.created_by AS adminCreatedBy, u.last_login AS adminLastLogin,
uta.id AS adminTenantAccessId, uta.user_id AS adminTenantAccessUserId, uta.tenant_id AS adminTenantAccessTenantId, uta.account_acl_mode AS adminTenantAccessAccountAclMode, uta.process_acl_mode AS adminTenantAccessProcessAclMode, uta.created_at AS adminTenantAccessCreatedAt, uta.updated_at AS adminTenantAccessUpdatedAt FROM user u INNER JOIN user_role ur ON ur.id = u.role_id INNER JOIN user_tenant_access uta ON uta.user_id = u.id WHERE uta.tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY CASE WHEN u.login_id REGEXP '^[0-9]' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, CASE WHEN u.login_id REGEXP '^[0-9]' THEN CAST(u.login_id AS UNSIGNED) ELSE ASCII(UPPER(u.login_id)) END, u.login_id ASC

SELECT u.id AS adminId, u.login_id AS adminLoginId, u.name AS adminName, u.email AS adminEmail, u.role_id AS adminRoleId, ur.code AS adminRoleCode, u.status AS adminStatus, u.created_by AS adminCreatedBy, u.last_login AS adminLastLogin,
uta.id AS adminTenantAccessId, uta.user_id AS adminTenantAccessUserId, uta.tenant_id AS adminTenantAccessTenantId, uta.account_acl_mode AS adminTenantAccessAccountAclMode, uta.process_acl_mode AS adminTenantAccessProcessAclMode, uta.created_at AS adminTenantAccessCreatedAt, uta.updated_at AS adminTenantAccessUpdatedAt FROM user u INNER JOIN user_role ur ON ur.id = u.role_id INNER JOIN user_tenant_access uta ON uta.user_id = u.id WHERE uta.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND UPPER(TRIM(u.login_id)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{loginId})) LIMIT 1
SELECT id, login_id, name, email, role_id, status FROM user WHERE UPPER(TRIM(login_id)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{loginId})) LIMIT 1
SELECT id, login_id, name, email, role_id, status FROM user WHERE LOWER(TRIM(email)) = LOWER(TRIM(#{email})) LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (login_id, name, email, password, secondary_password, role_id, status, created_by, read_only) VALUES ( #{loginId}, #{name}, #{email}, #{password}, #{secondaryPassword}, #{roleId}, #{status}, #{createdBy}, #{readOnly})
